caribbean.headline: Bimini Faces Strong Winds
caribbean.paragraph: Strong winds are building across Bimini, with forecasted max winds of 27 kt and wave heights of 3.3 ft, while Ocho Rios is experiencing much calmer conditions with max winds of 10 kt. I expect a 68% chance of rain in Bimini, making it the top impact port in the Caribbean today.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing winds of 19 kt with wave heights reaching 10.8 ft, while Mykonos is seeing stronger winds at 26 kt. I expect the Eastern Mediterranean to see significant weather impacts today, particularly in these ports, with an 85% chance of rain in Haifa and rough seas in both locations.
